title: Just a curiosity question
wikitext:
[]: Just a curiosity question...             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Fri Jan 31, 2014 2:55 pm When 1.11 first came out, what was everyone's reaction to the Kaworu scene at the end? I mean both personally and generally. I can imagine everyone kind of blew up, it's almost a "twist ending", and even now 5 years later it still has us in confusion.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jan 31, 2014 4:55 pm Thread isn't that long compared to the 2.0 and 3.0 opening day threads, but you can read about the 1.0 initial reactions here: https://forum.evageeks.org/thread/3340/Rebuild-10-You-are-not-alone-Reviews-Spoilers/ My reaction from opening night: http://forum.evageeks.org/post/87928/Rebuild-10-You-are-not-alone-Reviews-Spoilers/#87928

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Fri Jan 31, 2014 5:57 pm Oh man the first few pages of that thread are golden. If only I'd been here to experience it live.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Jan 31, 2014 6:14 pm Ornette wrote: My reaction from opening night: http://forum.evageeks.org/post/87928/Rebuild-10-You-are-not-alone-Reviews-Spoilers/#87928

[]:             Quote Post by Sephizim » Fri Jan 31, 2014 8:07 pm The Ramiel upgrade was a much-needed one. Makes for a more active and engaging Angel. As for the Kaworu part... I don't think of that as a twist, really. I mean, I don't think there was anyone who didn't think Kaworu was going to show up in Rebuild. And since the manga set the precedent of introducing him earlier, I don't even think its a stretch that he showed up after Operation Yashima. What I found more compelling were the mysteries surrounding the scene at the time, like what's going on with the moon, and is that the actual Lilith? But Kaworu being there seemed more like the creators being like, "Yeah, he's gonna be in it too."

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Feb 01, 2014 4:42 am ^ The shot of Kaworu opening his eyes was in the trailers, so everyone knew that he would make an appearance in 1.0, what people didn't expected was that it would be on the freaking Moon with a giant blood spurt with what looks like Lilith from NGE nearby and him talking as if he already lived these events before. Although cut content from the 2.0 CRC reveals that the blood spurt is from 2I, not Rei-Lilith, no idea about the coffins or his strange words.
summary:

I mean both personally and generally. I can imagine everyone kind of blew up, it's almost a "twist ending", and even now 5 years later it still has us in confusion.
